experience.title: Co-founder & CTO
experience.description:
- Co-founded and scaled Slab to multi-million dollar ARR and profitability with backing from Matrix Partners, CRV, and NEA, achieving 3x year-over-year growth at peak.
- Drove development for Slab’s team knowledge management platform, adopted by clients including Asana, Ramp, and Forbes, offering intuitive content creation, organization, and seamless integrations with tools including Slack, Google Drive, and GitHub for search and sync.
- Led company operations, managing Engineering with 1 manager and 7 senior+ engineers, Support with 1 lead and 2 specialists, and 2 recruiters. Established company-wide processes for hiring, mentoring, performance management, and engineering excellence.
- Designed client-side architecture and strategy with TypeScript, React, GraphQL/Apollo, and Storybook across web, browser extension, Electron desktop, and Cordova mobile apps. Implemented best practices including component-driven development, cohesive design systems, pragmatic testing, and rigorous code reviews.
- Implemented the core client application, delivering key features such as a post viewer with an editor and comments in a dynamic layout, a topic system with flexible permissions and mass drag-and-drop reorganization, a universal content importer, and an integration framework with 50+ enterprise tools for content syncing, embedding, and authentication.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description:
- Spearheaded Airbnb Plus as a founding engineer, establishing the technical foundation for new user-facing listing pages and internal tools for quality audits and photography to support the premium listing segment.
- Orchestrated a company-wide Swift 2 to 3 migration in collaboration with Apple, driving cross-team alignment and leading a 3-person team to achieve zero development freezes or production regressions through phased rollout and systematic benchmarking.
- Built the React Native host dashboard as part of a major app redesign, implementing complex calendar layouts and dynamic income visualizations across iOS and Android.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description:
- Led a 4-person frontend team developing a social platform for high-profile clients, including Lady Gaga, Coca-Cola, and MLBPA. Drove early React adoption, migrating from Backbone.js and establishing modern frontend practices.
- Developed key features, including full site redesigns, a high-performance masonry layout for media-rich feeds, a threaded comment system, and a real-time chat supporting hundreds of concurrent users.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Designed and implemented an embeddable WePay Store.

projects.name: AI Changelog
projects.description: Created a product transforming GitHub activities into human-readable changelogs using LLMs. Optimized performance and cost through model benchmarking and prompt engineering across GPT-3.5 turbo, GPT-4 mini, and Claude 3 Haiku. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and React Server Components on Vercel.

projects.name: WhatFont
projects.description: Created a popular browser extension for web typography inspection with 3-million+ weekly users. Built with React and Tailwind CSS.
